---
name: Feature Request or Task Suggestion
about: Suggest an idea or new task for DevEvent Tracker
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. I am frustrated when...)

**Describe the Proposed Solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Explain the new behavior, feature, or task you'd like to implement.

**Describe Alternatives You've Considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Visuals/Mockups**
If you have any sketches, mockups, or reference designs, please attach them here.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
